name: Coconut Delight Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease a 9x13-inch baking pan.
2. In a bowl, mix the crushed pineapple and juice until the sugar is dissolved.
3. Pour the pineapple mixture over the baked cake and spread evenly.
4. Sprinkle the cream of coconut over the top of the cake.
5. Sprinkle the shredded coconut on top and pour the remaining pineapple mixture over it.
6. Spread the Cool Whip evenly over the cake.
7. Refrigerate for several hours before serving.
A very simple and very good coconut cake. Bette...NM.
